## Testing Done
<!-- Explain how you tested your changes -->

### Functional Testing
- [ ] Tested locally with development server
- [ ] Verified all affected features work correctly
- [ ] Checked API / backend changes (if applicable)

### UI/UX Testing
- [ ] Verified responsive design on mobile (375px)
- [ ] Verified responsive design on tablet (768px)
- [ ] Verified responsive design on desktop (1024px+)

### Accessibility Testing
- [ ] Tested keyboard navigation (Tab, Enter, Escape)
- [ ] Verified screen reader announces key elements
- [ ] Checked color contrast ratios
- [ ] Validated ARIA attributes where applicable

### Theme Testing
- [ ] Tested in Light theme
- [ ] Tested in Dark theme
- [ ] Tested in Night Light theme

### Build & Lint
- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes without warnings
- [ ] No new console errors in browser
